name: souroldgeezer-design
description: Reference-driven design skills for sustainable software, responsive web UI, HTTP APIs, and ArchiMate® architecture models. Covers code/module/script boundaries and dependencies, WCAG™ 2.2 AA responsive UI, HTTP API design with Azure® Functions™ runtime, Node.js® hosted/serverless and hosted Next.js™ runtime extensions, Azure® Cosmos DB™ / Azure® Blob Storage™ data extensions, and ArchiMate® 3.2 OEF build/extract/review/render/lookup. Includes canonical-path drift detection, .NET™ / Bicep™ / workflow lifting, deployment topology, trust boundaries, packaged Java™ layout validation, warning evidence, route repair, global polish, OEF materialization, rendered PNG validation, external validation handoff, layout policy diagnostics, layout provenance output, change classification, per-view readiness matrix, render-contract disclosure, skill self-check, matching Claude Code subagents, and Codex skill metadata.

interface.shortDescription: Reference-driven software, UI, API, and architecture design.
interface.longDescription: Build, extract, review, and look up sustainable software design, responsive UI, API design, and ArchiMate® architecture guidance with bundled references.
defaultPrompt: Review this module design for coupling and boundary risks.
Review this UI against the responsive design reference.
Design or review the API and architecture for this feature.
